groups.title: ACCOMMODATION REQUEST FORM
groups.desc:
Questions 1-4
Complete the form below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect:
Name: Sara Lim
Age: 23
Length of time in Australia: $21872$
Present address: Flat 1, 539, $21873$ Road Canterbury 2036
Present course: $21874$ English
Accommodation required from: $21875$ 7th September

questions.analysis: 题干问的是“在澳大利亚的时间长度”，对应的定位词是“Length of time”。在听力原文中，Sara提到她在阿德莱德待了一年，在悉尼待了六个月。将这两个时间加起来，总共是1.5年。因此，正确答案是“1.5 year”。需要注意的是，题目要求答案不能超过三个单词或一个数字，所以“1.5 year”是最简洁且符合要求的答案。
答案是“forest”，因为在听力材料中，Sara明确提到她的现住地址是“Flat one, five three nine Forest Road, Canterbury”。题干要求填写的是街道名，而“Forest”是街道名，因此答案是“forest”。
答案是“academic”，因为听力原文中明确提到SARA现在正在学习“Academic English”。通过定位词“Present course”和信号词“now”，我们可以准确找到答案所在的句子，并提取出正确的答案词“academic”。
答案是“Thursday”，因为听力材料中明确提到Sara需要在她表弟到达的前一天搬出，而她表弟到达的时间是星期五早上。通过定位词“7th September”和信号词“seventh of September”，可以快速找到答案所在的对话部分，并确认具体的搬出日期是星期四。

groups.desc:
Questions 5-7
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: Sara requires a
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是B. twin room。通过对话中Sara明确表示她想和别人合住一个房间，可以得出这个结论。学生需要特别注意对话中的关键词和信号词，以便准确定位答案。

questions.title: She would prefer to live with a
questions.analysis: 正确答案是B. single person。Sara明确表示她更愿意与单独居住的退休女性住在一起，而不是与家庭或夫妻住在一起。她提到“Do you have any women living alone, retired women?”，这表明她的偏好是单独居住的人。

questions.title: She would like to live in a
questions.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A. flat。通过听力原文可以明确得知SARA对住在flat没有问题，并且她的阿姨也住在flat。因此，选择A是最符合题意的。学生在做题时应注意抓住关键词和信号词，结合上下文进行判断。

groups.desc:
Questions 8-10
Complete the sentences below.
Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD for each answer.
groups.collect:
The $21879$ will be $320.
She needs to pay the rent by cash or cheque on a $21880$ basis.
She needs to pay her part of the $21881$ bill.

questions.analysis: 答案是“deposit”，因为听力材料中明确提到“three hundred and twenty dollars as a deposit before you move in”。题干中的定位词是“$320”，在听力材料中对应的信号词是“three hundred and twenty dollars”。当听到这个金额时，考生应该特别注意接下来的内容，从而得出正确答案“deposit”。
这道题的正确答案是“monthly”，因为听力原文明确提到“pay monthly to me, by cash or cheque”。题干中的定位词“rent”、“cash”、“cheque”帮助考生快速定位到相关信息，而信号词“pay”进一步提示答案即将出现。即使基础较差的学生，通过抓住关键词和上下文，也能较容易地猜测出正确答案。
题干要求填入一种账单类型。听力原文中提到“you will need to pay your proportion of the phone bill”，这里的“phone bill”即为答案。题干中的“bill”是定位词，原文中的“pay”和“proportion”是信号词，帮助我们定位到答案句。由于题干要求填入一种账单类型，因此正确答案是“phone”。

transcript.en: LYNDA:SARA, I've heard that you want to move into a homestay family.
transcript.cn: 琳达：萨拉，我听说你想搬进住宿家庭，

transcript.en: Is that correct?
transcript.cn: 这是真的吗？

transcript.en: SARA:Yes, that's right.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：没错。

transcript.en: I've been staying with my aunt and now my cousin is arriving from Singapore and my aunt needs the room for him.
transcript.cn: 我一直和我姑姑一起住，现在我表弟从新加坡回来了，我姑姑需要给他准备一个房间。

transcript.en: LYNDA:Oh, that's bad luck.
transcript.cn: 琳达：哦，运气不太好。

transcript.en: Well, I'll need to get some particulars first.
transcript.cn: 那么我首先需要了解一些情况。

transcript.en: SARA, what's your full name?
transcript.cn: 萨拉，你的全名是什么？

transcript.en: SARA:SARA Lim, and that's SARA without the 'h' at the end.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：萨拉·林穆，萨拉的结尾没有h。

transcript.en: LYNDA:Mmm.
transcript.cn: 琳达：嗯。

transcript.en: How old are you.
transcript.cn: 你多大了。

transcript.en: SARA?
transcript.cn: 莎拉？

transcript.en: SARA:Twenty-three, only just.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：刚刚好23。

transcript.en: It was my birthday on the twenty-first of August.
transcript.cn: 8月21日是我的生日。

transcript.en: LYNDA:Happy birthday for yesterday.
transcript.cn: 琳达：祝你昨天生日快乐。

transcript.en: How long have you been in Australia?
transcript.cn: 你来澳大利亚多久了？

transcript.en: SARA:A year in Adelaide and six months in Sydney.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：我在阿德莱德待了一年，悉尼待了六个月。

transcript.en: I prefer Sydney, I've got more friends here.
transcript.cn: 我更喜欢悉尼，我有更多的朋友在这里。

transcript.en: LYNDA:What's your address at your aunts house?
transcript.cn: 琳达：你姑姑家的地址是什么？

transcript.en: SARA:Flat one, five three nine Forest Road, Canterbury.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：坎特伯雷，福雷斯特路539号，1号公寓，

transcript.en: And the post code is two, o, three, six.
transcript.cn: 邮政编码是2036。

transcript.en: LYNDA:OK.
transcript.cn: 琳达：好。

transcript.en: What are you studying now?
transcript.cn: 你现在正在学习什么？

transcript.en: SARA:I was studying General English in Adelaide and now I'm doing Academic English, because I'm trying to get into Medicine next year.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：我曾经在阿德莱德学习通用英语。现在我正在学习学术性英语，因为我明年想学医。

transcript.en: LYNDA:That sounds good, but it'll take you a long time.
transcript.cn: 琳达：听起来不错，但它会花费你很长的时间。

transcript.en: When would you like to move out from your aunt's?
transcript.cn: 你想什么时候从你姑姑家搬走？

transcript.en: SARA:My cousin arrives on Friday morning, so I'd better be out on Thursday.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：我表弟周五早上回来。所以我最好周四就搬走。

transcript.en: LYNDA:What, the seventh of September?
transcript.cn: 琳达：什么，九月七日？

transcript.en: SARA:Yes, that's right.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：是的，没错。

transcript.en: LYNDA:That doesn't leave us much time.
transcript.cn: 琳达：没剩下多少时间了。

transcript.en: Right.
transcript.cn: 是的。

transcript.en: OK.
transcript.cn: 好吧。

transcript.en: I need to know what kind of accommodation you'd like, so I can get you something suitable.
transcript.cn: 我想知道你喜欢什么样的住处，这样我好给你找到适合的房子。

transcript.en: SARA:Can I share a room with someone else?
transcript.cn: 萨拉：我能和别人合住吗？

transcript.en: I've been alone in my room at my aunt's and I've always shared with my sister and I like that.
transcript.cn: 在我姑姑家我是一个人住，但我总和我姐姐合住，我喜欢这样。

transcript.en: LYNDA:Yes, fine.
transcript.cn: 琳达：当然好。

transcript.en: That'll save you money too.
transcript.cn: 这样也能帮你省钱。

transcript.en: Would you like to live with a family or do you think that a single person would be better for you?
transcript.cn: 你想和一个家庭合住还是觉得单身人士适合你。

transcript.en: I have lots of very nice single people on my books.
transcript.cn: 我的本上记载着许多不错的单身人士。

transcript.en: SARA:Do you have any women living alone, retired women?
transcript.cn: 萨拉：你那里有单独居住的退休女士吗？

transcript.en: LYNDA:Yes.
transcript.cn: 琳达：有。

transcript.en: I have quite a few whose children have grown up and left home.
transcript.cn: 我这里有几个，她们的孩子都长大成人离家了。

transcript.en: In fact, I have some really lovely retired ladies, living by themselves, who just love the company of students.
transcript.cn: 事实上，我这里有一些很和善的独居退休女士，她们喜欢有学生的陪伴。

transcript.en: Most of them live in flats, but that's not a problem for you, is it?
transcript.cn: 她们多数住在公寓里，不过这个对你不是问题吧？

transcript.en: SARA:Not at all.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：没关系。

transcript.en: I'm used to that.
transcript.cn: 我已经习惯了。

transcript.en: My aunt lives in a flat too, remember.
transcript.cn: 我姑姑也是住在公寓里，记得吗？

transcript.en: I'm not used to a big house with a garden, swimming pool, pets and all that.
transcript.cn: 我对有花园、游泳池、宠物或这类东西的大房子不习惯。

transcript.en: LYNDA:OK, fine.
transcript.cn: 琳达：好的，

transcript.en: I know quite a bit about what you want now.
transcript.cn: 我现在差不多知道你想要什么样的了。

transcript.en: I should let you know that your rent will be a hundred and sixty dollars per week.
transcript.cn: 我该让你知道你的房租每周是160美元。

transcript.en: You'll have to pay me three hundred and twenty dollars as a deposit before you move in.
transcript.cn: 在你搬进去之前，你要付给我320美金的押金。

transcript.en: The deposit is as insurance, in case you break something.
transcript.cn: 押金是以防你弄坏一些东西。

transcript.en: You'll need to pay monthly to me, by cash or cheque, I don't mind.
transcript.cn: 你按月付款，我不介意是现金还是支票。

transcript.en: You don't need to pay for gas, electricity or water, but you will need to pay your proportion of the phone bill.
transcript.cn: 你不用付煤气费、电费和水费。但是你得付你那部分电话费。

transcript.en: Most families do that on an honour system, but you'll have to wait and see.
transcript.cn: 多数家庭用他们的信用制处理账单，不过你得等等看。

transcript.en: SARA:Mmm.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：嗯。

transcript.en: LYNDA:Have you got any more questions for me?
transcript.cn: 琳达：你有什么问题问我吗？

transcript.en: SARA:When will you know where I can go?
transcript.cn: 萨拉：什么时候你知道我能搬去哪儿？

transcript.en: LYNDA:I'll work on it now, so come and see me tomorrow and I should have some news for you then.
transcript.cn: 琳达：我现在就开始找。明天你再来看看，那时候我应该会有一些消息给你。

transcript.en: SARA:Thanks a lot.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：非常感谢。

transcript.en: LYNDA:Goodbye.
transcript.cn: 琳达：再见。

transcript.en: See you tomorrow - after lunch would be better for me.
transcript.cn: 明天见。最好午饭过后来找我

transcript.en: SARA:OK , see you then.
transcript.cn: 萨拉：好的，

transcript.en: Bye.
transcript.cn: 到时候见。

groups.desc:
Questions 11-14
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: When is this year’s festival being held?
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是C. 25-31 January。通过定位词“this year’s festival”和信号词“this year, the Summer Festival”，可以在听力原文中找到对应的答案句“they’ve put it at the end of the month”。理解并识别“end of the month”是解答本题的关键。

questions.title: What will the reviewer concentrate on today?
questions.analysis: 正确答案是A. theatre。录音中明确提到“I'm looking at some of the theatrical events”，这直接对应了题干中的“concentrate on today”。学生在听力过程中需要特别注意这些关键词和信号词，以便准确定位答案。

questions.title: How many circuses are there in the festival?
questions.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C. several。听力原文中提到“I'm going to tell you about two circus performances, but there are plenty of others in the programme.”，这表明除了提到的两个马戏团表演外，还有很多其他的马戏团表演。因此，正确答案是C. several。

questions.title: Where does Circus Romano perform?
questions.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是B. in a tent。听力原文中明确提到Circus Romano表演的地点是“marquee”，而marquee是一种帐篷。题干中的定位词是“Circus Romano”，在听力原文中对应的信号词是“performing in a marquee”。通过理解和识别这些关键的定位词和信号词，可以准确找到答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 15-20
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.analysis: 答案是“lights”，因为听力原文明确提到“the best part is the music and lighting”，而表格中需要填入的是“music and【15】”，所以正确答案是“lighting”。通过定位词“Circus Romano”和“music”，以及信号词“best part”，可以准确找到答案所在的句子。
答案是“adults”，因为听力材料明确提到“it's really for adult tastes”，并且进一步说明“much of it would be wasted on children”，这表明这个表演主要是针对成年人的，而不是孩子。
答案是"studio theatre"。在听力材料中，明确提到"Circus Electrica"的表演地点是"Studio Theatre"。通过定位词"Circus Electrica"和信号词"second circus performance"，可以迅速找到相关信息并填入正确答案。

第18题的正确答案是“whole family”。通过定位“Circus Electrica”和“Type of audience”相关的内容，可以在听力原文中找到对应的句子：“But it's still well worth seeing: a good one for the whole family.” 这句话明确指出了Circus Electrica适合全家观看，因此答案是“whole family”。

答案是“city gardens”，因为听力原文明确提到“the famous Mekong Water Puppet Troupe, performing in the City Gardens this week”，这表明湄公河水上木偶剧团的表演地点是城市花园。题干中的定位词“Mekong Water Puppets”帮助我们快速定位到相关信息，而信号词“Mekong Water Puppet Troupe”则在听力原文中引导我们找到具体答案。

答案是“young children”，因为听力原文明确提到“It's a must for young children though, and that's the audience it's really aimed at”。通过定位词“Mekong Water Puppets”和“Type of audience”，可以快速找到答案句。即使基础较差的学生，也可以通过抓住关键词和信号词来提高答题的准确性。

transcript.en: Geoffrey:Good evening, and in this week's edition of Focus on the Arts', Jane Hemmington is going to fill us in on what's in store for us at this year's Summer Festival.
transcript.cn: 杰弗里：晚上好，这期的《聚焦艺术》，简·海明顿将告诉我们今年的夏季嘉年华会有什么。

transcript.en: Over to you, Jane.
transcript.cn: 接下来交给你，简。

transcript.en: JANE:Thank you, Geoffrey.
transcript.cn: 简：谢谢，杰弗里。

transcript.en: This year, the Summer Festival Is the biggest we've ever seen, so there should be something for everybody.
transcript.cn: 今年的夏季嘉年华是我们所见过的最盛大的一场，所以那里肯定会为大家呈现精彩的一幕。

transcript.en: This is the third year they've run it and the timing's slightly different: for the last couple of years, it's been around the fifth to seventeenth, but this year they wanted to allow everyone enough time to recover from the first of January celebrations and they've put it at the end of the month.
transcript.cn: 这次是他们举办的第三年，而时间上会稍有不同。前几年是在5日到17日左右，但是今年他们想让每个人有足够的时间从第一个一月的庆祝中缓过来，所以他们将日期安排在了月底。

transcript.en: The programme has sensational theatre, dance and also a large number of art exhibitions, but the thing the Festival is most famous for is its great street music.
transcript.cn: 节目包括引人轰动的戏剧，舞蹈和大量的艺术展览，但是嘉年华最著名的是它的街头音乐。

transcript.en: For today's report though, Geoffrey, I'm looking at some of the theatrical events that you might like to see;
transcript.cn: 杰弗里，至于今天的报道，我看到了一些戏剧性的事情，你也许也想看看。

transcript.en: in particular, at this year's theme - circuses.
transcript.cn: 特别是今年的主题是马戏团。

transcript.en: I'm going to tell you about two circus performances, but there are plenty of others in the programme.
transcript.cn: 我打算跟你们讲讲其中两个马戏团的表演，不过这里还有很多其他的马戏团。

transcript.en: I've chosen these because they represent distinct movements within circus performance.
transcript.cn: 我选择这两个是因为它们在马戏团的表演中与众不同。

transcript.en: The first is the Circus Romano from Italy.
transcript.cn: 第一个是来自意大利的罗马诺马戏团。

transcript.en: As this is a travelling circus, it follows a long tradition by performing in a marquee - which is really like a canvas portable building, usually put up in a green space or car park, rather than in a theatre or stadium.
transcript.cn: 这是一个巡回马戏团，它遵循传统在大帐篷里表演，它像是一个帆布的便携式建筑，通常建在绿地和停车场，而不是在剧院或体育场里。

transcript.en: In spite of this, Circus Romano isn't at all like the traditional circuses I grew up with.
transcript.cn: 尽管如此，罗马诺马戏团并不像陪我长大的那些传统马戏团一样。

transcript.en: There are no animals - just very talented clowning and acrobatic routines.
transcript.cn: 这里没有动物，只有非常聪明的小丑和杂技。

transcript.en: The show has a lot of very funny moments, especially at the beginning , but the best part is the music and lighting.
transcript.cn: 表演有很多有趣的场面，特别是开始的时候，但是最棒的是音乐和灯光。

transcript.en: They're magical.
transcript.cn: 非常魔幻。

transcript.en: At forty-five dollars it's very expensive anyway - it's really for adult tastes.
transcript.cn: 总之，45美元是很贵的，很符合成人的口味。

transcript.en: In fact , much of it would be wasted on children - so I suggest you leave them at home.
transcript.cn: 事实上，对孩子来说有点浪费，所以我建议你们把孩子留在家里。

transcript.en: The second circus performance is Circus Electrica at the Studio Theatre.
transcript.cn: 第二个马戏团表演是在小剧场的电力马戏团。

transcript.en: The purists are suggesting that this isn't a circus at all.
transcript.cn: 纯粹主义者说这根本不是一个马戏团。

transcript.en: It's a showcase for skills in dance and magic, rather than the usual ones you expect in a circus.
transcript.cn: 这里展示的是舞蹈和魔术的技巧，而不是你期望在马戏团里看到的那些普通节目。

transcript.en: With only six performers, it's a small production, which suits the venue well - the Studio only seals about two hundred people.
transcript.cn: 里面只有6名艺人，它是一个小型演出，很适合这个场地。

transcript.en: For my money it's the aerial displays which are outstanding as well as the magical tricks - features which are missing from Circus Romano.
transcript.cn: 在我看来，空中表演和魔术一样精彩，这些特色是罗马诺马戏团没有的。

transcript.en: An interesting feature of the show is that the performers are so young - the youngest is only fourteen.
transcript.cn: 节目的一个有趣的特点是表演者都很年轻，最年轻的一位只有14岁。

transcript.en: But it's still well worth seeing: a good one for the whole family.
transcript.cn: 但是仍然非常值得一看，是一个适合全家看的好节目。

transcript.en: And finally, as it's summer, you may wish to see some of the Festival performances that are being presented outdoors.
transcript.cn: 最后，正值夏日，你也许想看看一些室外的嘉年华表演。

transcript.en: Like the famous Mekong Water Puppet Troupe, performing in the City Gardens this week.
transcript.cn: 比如这周在城市花园表演的湄公河水木偶剧团。

transcript.en: Now, water puppetry is amazing!
transcript.cn: 水上木偶戏太棒了。

transcript.en: It's large puppets on long sticks controlled by puppeteers standing waist deep in the lake.
transcript.cn: 长棍上有一个大的木偶，由操纵木偶者在及腰的湖水中控制。

transcript.en: The puppets do comedy routines and there is some terrific formation dancing.
transcript.cn: 木偶会做一些喜剧节目和出色的团体舞。

transcript.en: This is a fantastic show and the best moment comes at the end - seeing the puppeteers.
transcript.cn: 这是一场极其棒的节目，最好的部分是在结尾的时候见到操作木偶者。

transcript.en: When the troupe walks up out of the water, you get this amazing feeling.
transcript.cn: 当团队从水中出来，你会感到很震惊。

transcript.en: It's really hard to believe that what you've been watching is lifeless wood and cloth.
transcript.cn: 你很难相信看到的只是一些没有生命的木头和布。

transcript.en: As an adult, I had a great time, but I did note that other older people in the audience weren't quite as taken with it as I was.
transcript.cn: 作为一个成年人，我度过了美好的时光，但是我也注意到一些比我年龄大的观众并不像我一样享受。

transcript.en: It's a must for young children though, and that's the audience it's really aimed at.
transcript.cn: 它肯定更适合小孩子，这也是他们的受众群体。

transcript.en: Well, that's all I've time for today, but I'll be back next week with more news of what's worth seeing and what it's best to miss.
transcript.cn: 今天就是这样，但是下周我会带来更多值得观看和最不容错过的消息。

groups.desc:
Questions 21-25
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: The man wants information on courses for
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是A. people going back to college。通过分析听力原文，可以发现对话中明确提到课程是为那些“returning to study”的学生设计的，这与选项A完全吻合。通过定位词“courses”和信号词“refresher courses”，可以快速定位到相关信息，并排除其他不相关的选项。

questions.title: The ‘Study for Success’ seminar lasts for
questions.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是 B. two days，因为听力原文明确提到“Study for Success” seminar 是在“first and second of February”，即为两天。通过抓住关键词和信号词，学生可以准确定位到答案所在的句子，并从中提取出关键信息。

questions.title: In the seminar the work on writing aims to improve
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是C. clarity。通过分析听力原文，可以发现答案句明确提到写作部分的目标是帮助学生“write more clearly”，即写得更清晰。因此，答案是C. clarity。学生在做题时应特别注意题干中的定位词“writing”，并在听力过程中关注与之相关的信号词，以便准确捕捉答案。

questions.title: Reading sessions help students to read
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是A. analytically。听力原文明确提到阅读课程的目的是“getting into the habit of analyzing material as you read it”，即培养分析性阅读的习惯。因此，答案是A。通过定位词“Reading sessions”和信号词“with reading”，可以快速找到对应的答案句，并确认答案。

questions.title: The seminar tries to
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是B（encourage interest in learning），因为听力内容明确提到“motivational exercises”以及帮助学生“feel positive and enthusiastic about their study”，这表明研讨会的目的是激发学生对学习的兴趣和积极性。通过定位词“seminar”和信号词“motivational exercises”，可以准确找到答案句并理解其含义，从而选择正确答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 26-30
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: A key component of the course is learning how to
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是A. use time effectively。听力材料中明确提到“time management”是课程的关键组成部分之一，这与选项A直接对应。学生在听力过程中应特别关注定位词“key component”及其信号词“key components”，并注意听力材料中提到的具体内容。

questions.title: Students who want to do the ‘Study for Success’ seminar should
questions.analysis: 题目要求学生选择一个最符合答案的选项。题干问的是“Students who want to do the ‘Study for Success’ seminar should”，即“想要参加‘Study for Success’研讨会的学生应该做什么”。在听力原文中，官员明确提到“it's essential that you book well ahead of time”，这句话的意思是“提前预定是必要的”，这与选项C“reserve a place in advance”完全对应。其他选项A和B虽然在听力材料中提到了一些相关的词汇，但并没有明确表示这是学生需要做的事情。因此，正确答案是C。

questions.title: The ‘Learning Skills for University Study’ course takes place on
questions.analysis: 正确答案是 B. Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday。因为原文明确提到课程是在“three consecutive mornings starting on a Monday”，即从星期一开始的连续三个早晨。通过抓住关键词和时间表达，学生可以准确定位到答案。

questions.title: A feature of this course is
questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是B. advice on coping with stress。通过对听力原文的分析，可以发现“stress management”是直接对应的答案词。题干中的定位词“feature”帮助我们锁定了需要关注的内容，而信号词“strategies, input about stress management”则引导我们找到具体的答案位置。对于基础较差的学生，可以通过抓住关键词和排除法来提高答题的准确率。

questions.title: The man chooses the ‘Study for Success’ seminar because

options.title: B
options.content: he wants to start at the beginning

options.title: C
options.content: he seeks to revise his skills

questions.analysis: 学生选择“Study for Success”研讨会的主要原因是他想从基础开始学习。这在听力材料中明确提到，学生说他认为自己最好从基础开始学习所有的策略。这与选项B“he wants to start at the beginning”直接对应。

transcript.en: OFFICER:Hello. Er, I'm Dawn Matthews.
transcript.cn: 官员：你好。我是道恩马休斯。

transcript.en: STUDENT:Yes, hello.
transcript.cn: 学生：你好。

transcript.en: I've been referred to you because I'm enquiring about the refresher courses that you run.
transcript.cn: 我想找你询问一下你的进修课程。

transcript.en: I'd like to find out a bit more about them.
transcript.cn: 我想多了解点儿信息。

transcript.en: OFFICER:OK.
transcript.cn: 官员：好的。

transcript.en: Well, we run quite a few different short courses for students who are either returning to study or studying part-time.
transcript.cn: 我们为重返校园和利用业余时间读书的学生提供一些不同的短期课程，

transcript.en: Um, tell me about your situation.
transcript.cn: 跟我说说你的情况。

transcript.en: STUDENT:Well, I think that I really need some help in preparing for the coming semester, especially to build up my confidence a bit and help me study effectively because, you see, I've been out in the work-force for nearly twelve years now, so it really is a long time since I was last a student.
transcript.cn: 学生：我想我真的需要一些帮助为了下学期做准备，特别是重塑我的自信心，提高我的学习效率。因为我已经离校工作了将近12年，所以离我还是学生的时代有点久远了。

transcript.en: OFFICER:Yes, it can seem like a long time, can't it?
transcript.cn: 官员：是的，确实是很长时间了，不是吗？

transcript.en: Um, well, let me start by telling you what courses we have that might suit you.
transcript.cn: 我先告诉你我们的哪些课程可能适合你。

transcript.en: Are you an undergraduate or a postgraduate?
transcript.cn: 你是本科生还是研究生，

transcript.en: Arts or Sciences?
transcript.cn: 文科还是理科？

transcript.en: STUDENT:Undergraduate and I'm in the Business faculty.
transcript.cn: 学生：我是本科生，在商学院。

transcript.en: OFFICER:Right then.
transcript.cn: 官员：好的。

transcript.en: First of all, there's our intensive 'Study for Success' seminar on the first and second of February.
transcript.cn: 首先，我们在二月第一天和第二天有集中化的“成功学习”研讨班。

transcript.en: It's aimed at students like you who are uncertain about what to expect at college, and looks at a fairly wide range of approaches to university learning, to motivate you to begin your study and build on your own learning strategies.
transcript.cn: 受众群体是像你一样不确定在大学学些什么，没有一个具体的学习方法的学生们。目的是激发你们的学习动力，建立你们自己的学习策略。

transcript.en: STUDENT:Mm, that sounds good.
transcript.cn: 学生：恩，听起来不错。

transcript.en: What are some of the strategies that are presented?
transcript.cn: 你提到的策略是什么？

transcript.en: OFFICER:Well, we try to cover all aspects of study.
transcript.cn: 官员：我们试图覆盖各个方面的学习。

transcript.en: Some of the strategies in writing, for example, would be improving your planning for writing, organising your thinking and building some techniques to help you write more clearly.
transcript.cn: 例如，在写作方面提高你的策划能力、组织你的思路、建立一些技巧帮你把内容写得更清晰。

transcript.en: With reading, there'll be sessions aimed at getting into the habit of analyzing material as you read it, and tips to help you record and remember what you have read.
transcript.cn: 有些读书方面的课程会帮你养成分析内容的习惯，还有一些帮你牢记你所读内容的窍门。

transcript.en: It really is very important to begin reading confidently right from the beginning.
transcript.cn: 从一开始就充满自信的读下去很重要。

transcript.en: STUDENT:Mm.
transcript.cn: 学生：嗯。

transcript.en: OFFICER:There's also advice on how to get the most from your lectures and practice in giving confident presentations, as well as how to prepare for exams.
transcript.cn: 官员：还有一些建议是关于如何充分利用讲座、练习自信的演讲和备考。

transcript.en: STUDENT:What about the motivational side of things?
transcript.cn: 学生：关于激励的那方面是怎样的？

transcript.en: OFFICER:Ah Well, there's a range of motivational exercises that we do to help the students feel positive and enthusiastic about their study.
transcript.cn: 官员：我们有很多的激励锻炼使我们帮助学生积极、热情的面对他们的学业。

transcript.en: The process of learning and exploring a subject can lead to a whole new way of looking at the world, and the study skills and techniques that you build up can be applied in all sorts of different ways.
transcript.cn: 学习、探索一个学科的过程可以引导我们用一种新的方式看世界，而且你建立的学习技能可以用在各个不同的方面。

transcript.en: STUDENT:Actually, I... I'm very excited about the whole thing of taking up studying again but, you know, I'm a little nervous about whether I'll manage to get everything done.
transcript.cn: 学生：事实上，我很激动又能重新学习了。但是我对于自己是否能搞定这一切而感到紧张。

transcript.en: I suppose it's the same for all mature students?
transcript.cn: 我想所有的成年学生都有这种感觉吧？

transcript.en: OFFICER:Of course it is.
transcript.cn: 官员：当然是。

transcript.en: Two of the key components of the course aretime management and overcoming procrastination.
transcript.cn: 课程的两个关键部分是时间管理和克服拖延症。

transcript.en: People discover that, once they learn to plan their days, all the work can be accomplished and there'll still be time for leisure.
transcript.cn: 人们发现一旦他们学会规划好每一天后，所有的工作都能完成并且还有休闲时间。

transcript.en: STUDENT:Is there an enrolment fee?
transcript.cn: 学生：需要注册费吗？

transcript.en: OFFICER:Well, er, oh, just a minute, let's see...
transcript.cn: 官员：稍等，让我看看。

transcript.en: Ah, the cost is thirty pounds, which includes all course materials and morning tea.
transcript.cn: 需要交30英镑，其中包括所有的材料费和早茶。

transcript.en: You have to arrange your own lunch.
transcript.cn: 午餐需要你自行解决。

transcript.en: STUDENT:That wouldn't be a problem.
transcript.cn: 学生：这不是问题。

transcript.en: I already make sandwiches for my three kids and my wife and myself every day.
transcript.cn: 我每天都为我的三个孩子、妻子和我自己做三明治。

transcript.en: I won't have to change my routine.
transcript.cn: 我的日常套路是不会改的。

transcript.en: OFFICER:No.
transcript.cn: 官员：不，

transcript.en: Now, I need to tell you that this is a very popular course and it's essential that you book well ahead of time.
transcript.cn: 是的，现在我得告诉你这是非常受欢迎的课程，你有必要提前预订。

transcript.en: In fact, the Course Convenor tells me that there are only five places left.
transcript.cn: 事实上，课程的召集人告诉我只剩下5个名额了。

transcript.en: STUDENT:What other course might be good for me?
transcript.cn: 学生：还有什么其他的课程对我有帮助吗？

transcript.en: OFFICER:There is one other that you could benefit from.
transcript.cn: 官员：还有一个课程你能受益。

transcript.en: It's simply called Learning Skills for University Study' and is on three consecutive mornings starting on a Monday, from nine to twelve, and costs twenty-five pounds.
transcript.cn: 它叫“大学学习技巧”，开始于周一的9点到12点，连续3个早晨的课程，花费25英镑。

transcript.en: This is aimed at upgrading the study skills most school-leavers have and help them cope with the increased demands of university study.
transcript.cn: 目的是帮助多数离校的人员提高学习技能，帮助他们应付要求渐高的大学学习。

transcript.en: It focuses mainly on making students more responsible for their own success.
transcript.cn: 重点是让学生为他们自己的成功负责。

transcript.en: STUDENT:What sort of things are covered in this course?
transcript.cn: 学生：这门课程包括什么？

transcript.en: OFFICER:Well, basically it's more advanced thinking, note-taking, reading and writing strategies, but also some input about stress management.
transcript.cn: 官员：基本上，更多的是培养先进思想、记笔记练习、读写策略和一些压力管理方面。

transcript.en: STUDENT:I think I'd be better off starting from the basics and looking at all the strategies, don't you?
transcript.cn: 学生：我想我最好从基础开始，看看所有策略，你说呢？

transcript.en: OFFICER:Yes from what you've told me.
transcript.cn: 官员：是的，从你告诉我的情况看，

transcript.en: I think that's more in line with your situation.
transcript.cn: 我认为这么做更适合你。

transcript.en: STUDENT:Alright then, um, can I book a place on the Study for Success seminar course now?
transcript.cn: 学生：好的，我现在能预定一个“成功学习”的课程名额吗？

transcript.en: OFFICER:Yes.Let me just get out a registration form and take down your details.
transcript.cn: 官员：当然，让我拿一张登记表记下你的详细资料。

groups.desc:
Questions 31 and 32
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: New Union Building Procedures to establish student opinion: • students were asked to give written suggestions on the building’s design • these points informed the design of A $21902$ • (there were $21903$ respondents) • results collated and report produced by Union Committee

questions.analysis: 答案是“questionnaire”，因为听力原文明确提到“suggestions then provided the basis for the design of a questionnaire”。通过定位词“design”和信号词“provided the basis for the design of a”，我们可以准确找到答案。学生在听力过程中应特别注意这些关键词和信号词，以确保能够正确填空。

答案是“about 2000”，因为听力原文明确提到“approximately two thousand of the College students”，而题目要求不超过两个单词或一个数字，所以“about 2000”是最合适的答案。通过定位词“respondents”和信号词“completed by”，学生可以准确找到答案所在的句子。即使基础较差的学生，也可以通过抓住关键的数字和数量词来提高正确率。

groups.desc:
Questions 33-37
Complete the table below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

content: access to living quarters, large site so more$21908$

questions.analysis: 答案是“education”，因为听力原文明确提到“in the city centre, near the Faculty of Education”。通过定位词“city centre”和信号词“city centre”，学生可以迅速定位到答案所在的句子，并从中提取出正确的答案“education”。
第34题的正确答案是“halls of residence”，因为听力材料明确提到Site Three的位置是“out of town, near the halls of residence”。考生需要通过定位词“Site Three”和“out of town”快速找到相关信息，并注意听力材料中的信号词来捕捉答案。
答案是“traffic and parking”，因为听力材料中明确提到“Site One was unpopular because of traffic and parking problems”。考生需要注意“Site One”这个定位词，并在听到后关注其后的描述。即使基础较差的学生，也可以通过抓住关键词和利用表格信息来推测答案。易错点主要在于忽略并列关系或拼写错误。
第36题的正确答案是“lecture rooms”。在听力材料中，明确提到“Site Two had a number of supporters, mainly because it was close to most lecture rooms.”，这句话解释了第二个地点受欢迎的原因是因为它靠近大多数讲座教室。因此，答案是“lecture rooms”。
第37题的正确答案是“facilities”，因为听力原文明确提到“the larger site would allow more room for a choice of facilities”。通过定位词“Site Three”和“large site”，以及信号词“larger site”，可以准确找到答案。即使基础较差的学生，也可以通过抓住关键词和上下文线索来推测正确答案。

questions.title: Which TWO facilities did the students request in the new Union building?
questions.analysis: 学生请求的新设施包括一个小型健身房和一个旅行社。听力原文中明确提到学生希望将现有的桌上游戏室改为小型健身房，并且有大量受访者支持设立旅行社和保险中心。因此，正确答案是 D 和 F。

groups.desc:
Question 39
Choose the correct letters A, B and C.

questions.title: Which argument was used AGAINST having a drama theatre?

options.title: A
options.content: It would be expensive and no students would use it

options.title: B
options.content: It would be a poor use of resources because only a minority would use it

options.title: C
options.content: It could not accommodate large production of plays

questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是B，因为原文明确提到反对建造戏剧剧院的理由是“waste of funds”，这与选项B中的“poor use of resources”是同义表达。通过定位词“drama theatre”和信号词“disagreement, against, waste of funds”，可以准确找到答案句并理解其含义。

questions.title: Which TWO security measures have been requested?

options.title: B
options.content: show Union card on entering the building

questions.analysis: 本题的正确答案是 A 和 C。听力原文中提到的 "video surveillance" 对应选项 A "closed circuit TV"，"security personnel who would check Student Union Cards on request" 对应选项 C "show Union card when asked"。这些都是学生会提出的安全措施。

transcript.en: We're very grateful that the Committee has agreed that a representative for the Students' Union can present students' suggestions about the design for the proposed new Union building.
transcript.cn: 我们非常感激委员会已经同意，一名学生会的代表可以对拟建的联合大厦提出学生们的意见。

transcript.en: We appreciate that some of our ideas may not be feasible in the circumstances, but we do feel that it is important that the ultimate beneficiaries of the facilities should have some say in its design.
transcript.cn: 在这种情况下，我们认为自己的有些想法可能不具备可行性。但是我们认为建筑的最终受益人提出的建设意见是很重要的。

transcript.en: If I could start by briefly explaining what steps were taken to find out student opinion and how we have arrived at conclusions.
transcript.cn: 如果我能先简单解释一下我们是如何听取学生意见及如何得出结论的。

transcript.en: Firstly, a meeting was held in the current Union for our SU Committee to explain the options.
transcript.cn: 首先，开了一个会议为学生委员会解释这个想法。

transcript.en: Then we invited all students to submit written suggestions for the design, placing cards in a suggestion box.
transcript.cn: 之后我们邀请所有学生就设计问题填写书面意见，在建议箱里放卡片。

transcript.en: These suggestions then provided the basis for the design of a (Q31&32)questionnaire, which was completed by (Q31&32)approximately two thousand of the College students over a period of three weeks.
transcript.cn: 这些建议为问卷的设计提供了依据，3周内有大约2000名大学生提交了意见。

transcript.en: Finally, the SU Committee collated the results and drew up a report.
transcript.cn: 最后，学生委员会收集结果并起草报告。

transcript.en: If I can just hand around a copy of that report.
transcript.cn: 如果我可以分发一下这个报道。

transcript.en: This presentation is essentially a summary and discussion of the key points of this report.
transcript.cn: 这次讲座主要是对这份报道的关键点进行概括、讨论。

transcript.en: So , in broad terms , the consensus was as follows.
transcript.cn: 所以大体上，意见如下。

transcript.en: Firstly , regarding the crucial matter of the site , we presented the three options that you have proposed.
transcript.cn: 首先，考虑到位置的重要性，我们提出了三条你们的观点。

transcript.en: One: in the city centre , near the Faculty of Education; two: on the outskirts of the city , near the park , and three: out of town , near the halls of residence.
transcript.cn: 第一：在市中心，临近教育学院。第二：在城市郊区，临近公园；第三：在城外，临近宿舍。

transcript.en: We asked students to cite reasons for and against these sites and , and there was remarkable agreement on all three.
transcript.cn: 我们让学生对这些地点写出支持与否的原因，结果三点出奇的一致。

transcript.en: Site One was unpopular because of traffic and parking problems.
transcript.cn: 第一处由于交通和停车问题而不受欢迎。

transcript.en: Site Two had a number of supporters , mainly because it was close to most lecture rooms.
transcript.cn: 第二处有许多支持者，主要是因为临近多数教室。

transcript.en: And Site Three , out of town , near the halls of residence was clearly the most popular because of access from living quarters.
transcript.cn: 第三处在城外，显然是因为接近住宿区而最受欢迎。

transcript.en: It was clear that the Union was mainly to be used after lectures.
transcript.cn: 很显然大厦的用途主要是在放学后使用。

transcript.en: It was also felt that the larger site would allow more room for a choice of facilities.
transcript.cn: 更大的场地可以容纳更多的房间放置更多的设备。

transcript.en: Our second area of interest was obviously the facilities: there was minimal interest in having a library on the premises, but one option seemed to be a reading room instead - more useful.
transcript.cn: 我们第二关心的显然是设施。人们对楼内建设图书馆的兴趣最低。但是有一种观点认为读书室更有用。

transcript.en: We would like the current table games room to be replaced with a small gym.
transcript.cn: 如果可能的话，我们希望目前的桌面游戏室换为小型体育馆，

transcript.en: And, if possible a small swimming pool - not, of course, Olympic-sized!
transcript.cn: 当然小型的游泳池不必像奥林匹克的尺寸一样大。

transcript.en: There was a large number of respondents in favour of a travel agent’s and insurance centre.
transcript.cn: 大量的受访者希望有一个旅行中介和保险中心。

transcript.en: We also request that there be the offices of the Student Counselling Centre, moving this from the Refectory.
transcript.cn: 我们还要求应该有一个学生咨询中心办公室，从餐厅移过来。

transcript.en: There was, however, much disagreement about whether to build a drama theatre.
transcript.cn: 关于是否建剧院有很多的分歧。

transcript.en: Just over forty per cent of the respondents were in favour, but a largish minority were strongly against it, claiming that it is elitist and a waste of funds.
transcript.cn: 超过40%的人同意，但是稍大的少部分人强烈反对，他们认为这是高级建筑且浪费资金。

transcript.en: Essentially the Jury is out on that.
transcript.cn: 基本上评审委员会不会采纳该意见。

transcript.en: Finally, given the number of unfortunate incidents in the current Union over the past few months, a strong point was repeatedly made about security.
transcript.cn: 最后，在过去的几个月里，考虑到大量的不幸事件发生在当前的大楼里，安全问题成了不断重复强调的重点。

transcript.en: The recommendations would be at least video surveillance and security personnel who would check Student Union Cards on request.
transcript.cn: 建议是至少设置视频监控并且让安保人员按要求检查学生卡。

transcript.en: We doubt if it would be feasible to have a check at reception of all people coming in.
transcript.cn: 我们怀疑检查所有进出人员的可行性。

transcript.en: Well, this is the summary of the views of the student population.
transcript.cn: 这就是关于学生建议的概括。

transcript.en: As I say, fuller details are given in our report but I'm happy to take any questions if you have them .. (fade out).
transcript.cn: 正如我所说，更多的详情将在报告中指出，如果你们还有问题，我很乐意回答……（淡出）
